title: mirabilis longipes
intro: Mirabilis longipes, also known as the desert four o'clock, is a species of flowering plant in the four o'clock family (Nyctaginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mirabilis longipes include treating wounds, skin conditions, and reducing fever, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
